title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!
